message:
test: add bidirectional validation between traceability matrix and issue inventory

Ensure all mapped_bead_ids referenced in the NTM-FCP traceability matrix
actually resolve to tracked issues in .beads/issues.jsonl, preventing
orphaned references as capabilities are documented and tracked.

Rust unit test (ntm_fcp_traceability_matrix.rs):
- Add load_issue_ids() helper that parses JSONL and extracts issue IDs
  into a HashSet with per-line error reporting
- Add traceability_matrix_mapped_bead_ids_exist_in_beads_export() test
  that cross-references every mapped_bead_ids entry against the live
  issue inventory

Shell e2e test (test_ft_3681t_1_5_1_traceability_matrix.sh):
- Add bead reference validation scenario using jq to construct an issue
  ID set from JSONL and check matrix references, with BEAD_REFERENCES_OK
  / BEAD_REFERENCE_MISSING result codes

Traceability matrix updates (ntm-fcp-traceability-matrix.json):
- Add ft.runtime.compatibility_seam (partial, gap_severity: low)
- Add ft.robot.search.diagnostics (implemented)
- Add ft.robot.agent_inventory (implemented)
- Add ft.robot.mission.tx_introspection (partial, gap_severity: low)
- Each entry links capability names, status, mapped beads, surfaces,
  and implementation anchors

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -72,6 +72,7 @@ echo "Log file:       ${LOG_FILE}"
 echo ""
 
 MATRIX_FILE="${ROOT_DIR}/docs/design/ntm-fcp-traceability-matrix.json"
+ISSUES_JSONL="${ROOT_DIR}/.beads/issues.jsonl"
 
 # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
 # Scenario 1: Matrix artifact structure checks
@@ -116,6 +117,26 @@ else
     echo "  FAIL: found unmapped high/medium gaps"
     fail
   fi
+
+  if [ ! -f "${ISSUES_JSONL}" ]; then
+    emit_log "FAIL" "bead_reference_existence" "ISSUES_JSONL_MISSING" "E-TM-004A" "${ISSUES_JSONL}" "issues export missing"
+    echo "  FAIL: ${ISSUES_JSONL} not found"
+    fail
+  elif jq -s -e '
+      .[0:-1] as $issues
+      | .[-1] as $matrix
+      | ($issues | map(.id) | map({key: ., value: true}) | from_entries) as $issue_ids
+      | [ $matrix.entries[] | .mapped_bead_ids[]? | select($issue_ids[.] != true) ]
+      | length == 0
+    ' "${ISSUES_JSONL}" "${MATRIX_FILE}" >/dev/null; then
+    emit_log "PASS" "bead_reference_existence" "BEAD_REFERENCES_OK" "" "${MATRIX_FILE}" "mapped bead ids resolve in issues export"
+    echo "  PASS: all mapped bead ids resolve in .beads/issues.jsonl"
+    pass
+  else
+    emit_log "FAIL" "bead_reference_existence" "BEAD_REFERENCE_MISSING" "E-TM-004B" "${MATRIX_FILE}" "missing mapped bead ids in issues export"
+    echo "  FAIL: traceability matrix references missing bead ids"
+    fail
+  fi
 fi
 
 # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
